title: ComputerCreate
description: Applies Create mod textures to CC: Tweaked
body:
# Computer Create Computer Create is a resource pack for minecraft that applies the texture style of the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) to all recent flavors of ComputerCraft (CC:Tweaked for forge, CC:Retistched for fabric). With this pack your computers will no longer looks out of place! The pack changes the textures of each block, and improves the GUIs of computers and turtles. ## Previews ![A GPS tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KqGEAQeu/images/2e2fd8e4944e2bbc4c2cefb51af67265f591b236.png) The gallery and the README on Github contains more screenshots. ## I have an issue, contributing Feel free to open an issue on the [GitHub](https://github.com/ascpial/ComputerCreate), if you have any question or issues. I you want to contribute, you can open a pull request and I will take a look at it. ## Plans The pack is globally finished, with all blocks and items textures. ## Reuse this resourcepack I have chosen the licence (CC BY) so that you can freely reuse the pack and modify it, but a mention to the original work is needed.

This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License.
